text: The stark corridor and barely-lit entryway evoke a sense of quiet tension in me—a feeling that something could either begin or end here. Then, stepping inside to vivid colors and the R+D wall, my apprehension shifts to curiosity. It feels like I have crossed a threshold from unease into a space devoted to thought, inquiry, and innovation. I feel both cautious and intrigued by the contrast and by what awaits in this environment of research and possibility.
